parameters.emailMessage/Subject: @concat('Concert request rejected before Planner creation: ', outputs('Compose_PlannerPlanName'))
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
@concat('

The concert request was rejected before Planner creation.

', '

Concert date ', string(outputs('Compose_ConcertDate')), ' must be later than the current Europe/Prague calendar date ', convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Central Europe Standard Time', 'yyyy-MM-dd'), '.

', '

No Planner content was created. Submit a new concert request with a future event date.

')

runError.message: The concert request date must be later than the current Europe/Prague calendar date.

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: @concat('Concert request rejected before Planner creation: ', outputs('Compose_PlannerPlanName'))
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
@concat('

The concert request was rejected before Planner creation.

', '

The shared workbook contract or shared plan configuration is invalid.

', '

Check the required workbook tables and columns, bucket catalog, and populated planning-label rows, then submit a new concert request.

', '

No Planner content was created.

')

runError.message: The workbook contract or shared plan configuration is invalid.

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: @concat('Concert request rejected before Planner creation: ', outputs('Compose_PlannerPlanName'))
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
@concat('

The concert request was rejected before Planner creation.

', '

The workbook contract could not be read through Excel Online Business. Verify the required workbook tables and access, then submit a new concert request.

', '

No Planner content was created.

')

runError.message: The workbook contract could not be read before Planner creation.

ComposeSelectedTaskValidationReason.inputs: @if(equals(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskId'), ''), 'TaskId is required.', if(equals(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskTitle'), ''), 'TaskName is required.', if(equals(length(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskGroupName')), 0), 'GroupName is required.', if(not(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskGroupExists')), 'GroupName does not resolve in tbGroups.', if(equals(length(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskAssignedToEmails')), 0), 'AssignedToEmails formula result is required.', if(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskAssignedToEmailsHasExcelError'), 'AssignedToEmails contains an Excel error.', if(or(equals(length(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskUniqueAssigneeTokens')), 0), greater(length(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskUniqueAssigneeTokens')), 20), not(equals(length(body('SelectSelectedTaskAssigneeTokens')), length(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskUniqueAssigneeTokens'))))), 'AssignedToEmails must resolve to 1-20 unique assignee addresses.', if(equals(length(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskDaysFromEvent')), 0), 'DaysFromEvent is required.', if(equals(length(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskBucketName')), 0), 'Bucket is required.', if(not(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskBucketExists')), 'Bucket does not resolve in tbBuckets.', if(and(greater(length(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskProgressName')), 0), not(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskProgressExists'))), 'Progress does not resolve in tbProgress.', if(equals(length(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskPriorityName')), 0), 'Priority is required.', if(not(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskPriorityExists')), 'Priority does not resolve in tbPriority.', if(and(greater(length(body('FilterSelectedTaskLabelTokens')), 0), or(not(equals(length(body('SelectSelectedTaskLabelTokens')), length(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskUniqueLabelTokens')))), not(equals(length(outputs('ComposeSelectedTaskUniqueLabelTokens')), length(body('FilterResolvedSelectedTaskLabelRows'))))))), 'Labels must resolve to unique tbLabels names.', '')))))))))))))

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: @concat('Concert request rejected before Planner creation: ', outputs('Compose_PlannerPlanName'))
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
@concat('

The concert request was rejected before Planner creation.

', '

No selected template row remained valid after preflight classification.

', '

Skipped selected rows: ', string(length(variables('skippedSelectedRowWarnings'))), '

', if(greater(length(variables('skippedSelectedRowWarnings')), 0), concat('
    ', join(variables('skippedSelectedRowWarnings'), ''), '
'), ''), '

No Planner content was created. Correct the selected workbook rows and submit a new concert request.

')

runError.message: No selected template row remained valid after preflight classification.

parameters.emailMessage/Body:
@concat('

Planner plan ', outputs('Compose_PlannerPlanName'), ' was created.

', '

Concert name: ', outputs('Compose_ConcertName'), '

', '

Template type: ', outputs('Compose_TemplateType'), '

', '

Location: ', outputs('Compose_Location'), '

', '

Concert date: ', string(outputs('Compose_ConcertDate')), '

', '

Created tasks: ', string(variables('createdTaskCount')), '

', '

Skipped selected rows: ', string(length(variables('skippedSelectedRowWarnings'))), '

', if(greater(length(variables('skippedSelectedRowWarnings')), 0), concat('

The plan was created with warnings.

    ', join(variables('skippedSelectedRowWarnings'), ''), '
'), ''))
